svg.text: Azure Machine Learning — Managed Endpoints with Blue/Green Deployments
Multi-Environment (Dev / Stage / Prod) with AKS Clusters, Private Networking & CI/CD

g.text: CI/CD PIPELINE — GITHUB ACTIONS & GIT BRANCHING
Data scientists create ML models + inference server, push code to feature/* branch
GH Actions builds feature branch → deploys containers to Dev AKS for automated unit testing
Tests pass → GH Actions creates PR to integration branch → deploys to Stage
Stage tests pass → PR to main → deploy to Prod → merge to main
Public ingress (Front Door → App Gateway → APIM) routes down into Prod AKS Inference Cluster
Model promotion: Dev (train) → Stage (validate) → Prod (canary → full)
